summary: Cycle Q (17th overnight-triage fire of UTC 2026-05-22) cleared cycle P's metric-integrity-deferred flag after testing P's handoff condition explicitly. P's condition (inbox empty AND cadence unchanged) was broken: 9 Founder substantive commits landed in the ~5h gap between P (14:07Z) and Q (19:02Z), including chore c514647d which directly modified a round-trip-implicated file (PROP-011 approved-file). Re-ran regen-all; round-trip moved 5→6 failures (5 carry-forward + 1 new PROP-011 lifecycle gap introduced by the chore). App-health jumped B+/82.8 → A-/85.3. Substantive heartbeat captured with attributions; not noise. Cycle P's founder_action_items remain valid (preserved below) — the cadence concern still applies even when the current fire was substantive.
founder_action_items: Investigate cron cadence — 17 fires/UTC date is still excessive for an empty-inbox path; cycle Q only produced substantive work because of a 5h gap that let Founder commits accumulate
Tighten empty-inbox exit in the overnight-triage prompt (guard on last-commit-recency + dashboard-freshness + substrate-stillness signal)
Investigate why FIQ + bug-reports inboxes never appeared on disk (path mismatch, broken hook, or aspirational paths in directive)
PROP-011 lifecycle-fields gap surfaced by c514647d — same contract pattern that fixed PROP-006 + PROP-010 in cycle O
